summary_one_line_zh: 代理配置、技能自进化与安全外泄，今天都在重写生产门槛
summary_one_line_en: Agent tuning, self-evolving skills, and exfiltration risks are shifting production defaults.

items.title_zh: 自然语言直调检索代理配置
items.why_zh: 把LLM/检索器/跳数/合成策略暴露成可控配置，意味着RAG性能不再只靠prompt微调。
items.why_en: Turns agent behavior into a tunable surface, not just prompt engineering, shifting how RAG is optimized.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们的检索链路参数化，做一次自然语言到配置的A/B测试。
items.so_what_en: Parameterize your retrieval stack and A/B test natural-language config generation.

items.title_zh: 会自造技能的代理框架
items.title_en: Agents that create their own skills
items.why_zh: 技能从静态资产变成可演化对象，直接影响长期任务代理的记忆、复用和评估架构。
items.why_en: Makes skills evolvable objects, changing memory, reuse, and evaluation architecture for long-horizon agents.
items.so_what_zh: 给代理加技能注册表和离线评测集，先验证“新技能”是否真提升成功率。
items.so_what_en: Add a skill registry plus offline evals to verify whether new skills actually improve success rates.

items.why_zh: 这不是提示注入老新闻，而是代理权限边界失守后，工具调用可直接变成数据外流通道。
items.why_en: Not old prompt injection news: it shows tool permissions can turn agent actions into a direct exfiltration channel.
items.so_what_zh: 审计你们代理的文件/邮箱/聊天工具权限，默认改成最小授权并加出网告警。
items.so_what_en: Audit agent file/email/chat permissions, switch to least privilege, and add egress alerts.
